articles.title: Breaking: DOJ Probes Whether Russia Used Binance To Elude Sanctions
articles.description: Per a Bloomberg report, the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) is investigating the world’s largest crypto exchange, Binance, over yet another potential use of alleged criminal activity. This time, U.S. authorities are looking into Russian agents’ using the platform to circumvent financial sanctions. Related Reading: Crypto Crash: Do Kwon Could Be Facing Record-Breaking Jail Term […]

articles.title: Prosecutor says Do Kwon’s extradition to South Korea would best serve Terraform Labs’ victims: Report
articles.description: The former Terraform Labs CEO could face 40 years in jail in South Korea, the country where he committed most of his crimes, according to local authorities.

articles.title: PEPE memecoin hits $1 billion market cap fueled by Binance listing
articles.description: The price of the new frog-themed memecoin has surged more than 4,000% since its inception on April 14.
